title: High Molecular Weight DNA Extraction from Fungal Tissue for PacBio Sequencing
author: Reynaldi Darma
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.9g3h3yn

steps.title: Grind fungal tissues 3-4 times for...
steps.instruction: Grind fungal tissues 3-4 times for 10-15 sec bursts adding liquid nitrogen each time. Do not exert excessive pressure while grinding the spores as this may shear the DNA.

steps.title: Add 200 µl proteinase Proteinase K...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µl proteinase Proteinase K (20 mg/mL) and incubate at RT for 1.5 hours on the orbital shaker with with slow agitation. 01:30:00

steps.title: Take the aqueous phase carefully and...
steps.instruction: Take the aqueous phase carefully and put it into new 50 mL falcon tube. Add 20µL RNAse A (10mg/ml) to the tube and incubate 30 mins at RT on the orbital shaker with with slow agitation. 00:30:00

steps.title: Add one volume of Phenol:Chloroform:Isoamyl Alcohol...
steps.instruction: Add one volume of Phenol:Chloroform:Isoamyl Alcohol (25:24:1) again into the tube, mix several times slowly, and centrifuge 5000g for 10 mins at RT. 00:10:00

steps.title: Take the aqueous phase carefully and...
steps.instruction: Take the aqueous phase carefully and put it into new 50 mL falcon tube. Add two volume of CTAB precipitation buffer and incubate the tube into the oven rotator with temperature 55 °C for 10-20 minutes (The mixture will be really cloudy). 00:20:00

steps.title: Centrifuge at 7500g for 30 mins...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 7500g for 30 mins at RT and then discard the supernatant. 00:30:00

steps.title: Centrifuge at 7500 for 20 mins at RT
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 7500 for 20 mins at RT. Discard most of the supernatant and leave around 1 mL of the supernatant on the tube. 00:20:00

steps.title: Discard the supernatant and air dry...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant and air dry the pellet for around 15 mins. Add 400 µL of 10 mM tris (pH8) and let the pellet dissolve for overnight at RT or at 4°C. Overnight

steps.title: Check whether the pellet has dissolved
steps.instruction: Check whether the pellet has dissolved. Incubate the tube at 37ºC for 10 -20 mins if the pellet hasn't dissolved yet. Measure the concentration and the purity of the crude DNA with Qubit and Nanodrop. 00:20:00

steps.title: Add 1 volume of PCI (5 mL) and mix slowly
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume of PCI (5 mL) and mix slowly. Centrifuge 5000g for 10 mins. Collect the aqueous phase from the centre of the tube slowly. (It's possible to have a milky layer in the inner surface of the tube). I usually take 3 mL from the aqueous phase. Additional PCI treatment can be performed to the aqueous phase if the milky layer can't be separated from that aqueous phase. 00:10:00

steps.title: Then add 0
steps.instruction: Then add 0.1 volume of 3M NaAc pH 5.2 (300 µL) and mix slowly.

steps.title: Add 1 volume of isopropanol (3
steps.instruction: Add 1 volume of isopropanol (3.3 mL) and mix slowly.

steps.title: Centrifuge 7500 g for 20 mins
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 7500 g for 20 mins. Discard the supernatant and add 5 ml of fresh 70% EtOH. incubate the mixture for 15 mins. 00:35:00

steps.title: Centrifuge at 7500 for 20 mins at RT
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 7500 for 20 mins at RT. Discard most of the supernatant and leave around 1 mL of the supernatant on the tube. 00:20:00

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet and gently dislocate the mixture into 1
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet and gently dislocate the mixture into 1.5 mL tube. Centrifuge at 7500g for 5 mins at RT. 00:05:00

steps.title: Transfer the mixture of ground tissues...
steps.instruction: Transfer the mixture of ground tissues and sand into 3 of 60 ºC pre-heated 50 ml falcon tubes containing extraction buffer as equal as possible.

steps.title: Add one volume of Phenol:Chloroform:Isoamyl Alcohol...
steps.instruction: Add one volume of Phenol:Chloroform:Isoamyl Alcohol (25:24:1) (16 ml) into the extraction tube, mix several times slowly, and centrifuge 5000g for 10 mins at RT. 00:10:00

steps.title: add 5 mL fresh 70% EtOH...
steps.instruction: add 5 mL fresh 70% EtOH to the tube, incubate for 15 mins at RT. 00:15:00

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet and gently dislocate the mixture into 1
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet and gently dislocate the mixture into 1.5 mL tube. Centrifuge at 7500g for 5 mins at RT. 00:05:00

steps.title: Add additional 1 mL of fresh...
steps.instruction: Add additional 1 mL of fresh 70% EtOH, mix slowly and centrifuge at 7500g for 5 mins at RT. 00:05:00

steps.title: Add additional 1 mL of fresh...
steps.instruction: Add additional 1 mL of fresh 70% EtOH, mix slowly and centrifuge at 7500g for 5 mins at RT. 00:05:00

steps.title: Add 500 µL of 10 mM...
steps.instruction: Add 500 µL of 10 mM tris (pH8) and let the pellet dissolve for overnight at RT or at 4°C. Overnight

steps.title: Check whether the pellet has dissolved
steps.instruction: Check whether the pellet has dissolved. Incubate the tube at 37ºC for 10 -20 mins if the pellet hasn't dissolved yet. Measure the concentration and the purity of the crude DNA with Qubit and Nanodrop. 00:20:00

steps.title: Perform 0
steps.instruction: Perform 0.45x AMPure XP beads clean up and size selection.

steps.title: Check the concentration and the purity...
steps.instruction: Check the concentration and the purity of the DNA with Qubit and Nanodrop after the AMPure XP beads treatment.

steps.title: Run pulsed-field gel electrophoresis to see...
steps.instruction: Run pulsed-field gel electrophoresis to see the size of the DNA.

steps.title: This is the concentration and purity...
steps.instruction: This is the concentration and purity of DNA from different steps. %s %s The final AMPure beads DNA has a concentration below 20µg and the 260/230 ratio below 1.8. However, I still used it for the sequencing.

steps.title: The pulsed-field gel showed the size...
steps.instruction: The pulsed-field gel showed the size of the majority of DNA after AMPure XP beads treatment was around 10kb - 97kb.

steps.title: The Sequel PacBio sequencing from the...
steps.instruction: The Sequel PacBio sequencing from the clean DNA sample yielded 13.47 Gb from 2 flow cells with the N50 of 20.7 kb. The de novo assembly from these reads generated 20 gapless contigs with 57.7 Mb genome size.

steps.title: Make extraction buffer in 50 ml falcon tube (x3)
steps.instruction: Make extraction buffer in 50 ml falcon tube (x3): 13 ml of CTAB lysis buffer 1.5 ml 10% PVP 10 1.5 ml 10% PVP 40

steps.title: Scrap fungal tissues from agar plate...
steps.instruction: Scrap fungal tissues from agar plate with scalpel directly without adding water and weight the total fungal cells. I used 1.3 gram wet weight of fungal cells from 9 plates.

steps.title: Prechill mortar, pestle, spatula, and sand...
steps.instruction: Prechill mortar, pestle, spatula, and sand (1gr sand / 100 mg fungal tissues) with liquid nitrogen.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant and air dry...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant and air dry the pellet for around 15 mins. 00:15:00

steps.title: Add 20µL RNAse A into 400...
steps.instruction: Add 20µL RNAse A into 400 µL crude DNA and incubate for 1 hour at RT on the orbital shaker with with slow agitation. 01:00:00

steps.title: Add 40µL Proteinase K to each...
steps.instruction: Add 40µL Proteinase K to each tube and incubate for 1 hour at RT on the orbital shaker with with slow agitation. 01:00:00

steps.title: Combine the aqueous phase from all...
steps.instruction: Combine the aqueous phase from all tubes together into one tube (they might have milky upper phase) and adjust the total volume of the aqueous phase into 5 mL with tris 10mM pH 8.

steps.title: Add PCI (460 µL) to each...
steps.instruction: Add PCI (460 µL) to each tube, mix slowly several times. Centrifuge 8000g for 5 mins. 00:05:00
